description_long: This is a large, contemporary sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features three wide seat cushions and five loose back cushions, all of which appear plush and generously filled for comfort. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, aligning with the backrest to create a boxy silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and slightly recessed, giving the sofa a low-profile appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or patterns. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A large, modern beige sofa with plush seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and a smooth, solid upholstery finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wide seat cushions, five loose back cushions, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the alignment of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned back panel and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three wide, loose seat cushions and five loose back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged in a single row with no visible attachment.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and forming a boxy profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, slightly recessed and likely made of wood or metal, with four visible supports positioned near the corners.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with five loose, uniform back cushions placed along its length, continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in beige with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
